current.summary: Capability monitor pipeline: full develop workflow complete (brainstorm → panel → design → plan → quality → parity → beads → Phase B). 67 beads created with dependency chains. Ready to execute Phase 1.

activeWork.description: Built the complete implementation plan for syllago capmon — a deterministic capability extraction pipeline replacing LLM-based provider capability audits. All pre-execution gates passed. 67 beads ready with bead-chain structure (impl→validate pairs, phase gates).
activeWork.progress: COMPLETED THIS SESSION: (1) Claimed handoff from brainstorm/panel session. (2) Dispatched plan-writing subagent → 2,540-line plan across 10 phases. (3) Quality review found 15 issues → fix subagent addressed all 15 → plan grew to 5,550 lines → re-review passed 11/11. (4) Parity validation found 5 gaps (missing json-schema extractor, staleness flags, generate wiring, migration window, ReferenceEntry type) → fixed → re-validation passed clean. (5) Created 67 beads (1 epic syllago-jtafb + 66 tasks) with full dependency chains. (6) Phase B deep analysis found 10 plan updates + created 2 discovered beads (go.mod dependencies) + added 5 dependencies. All gates passed.

recentDecisions: Plan uses Red/Green TDD on every impl task: test → fail → implement → pass → commit
Bead-chain structure: impl→validate pairs (different agent validates) + phase gates. 67 total beads.
Phase B discovered 2 prerequisite beads: go.mod dependency additions must happen before extractors that import them
Phase B fixed forward reference bug: Task 6.2 test called SetGHCommandForTest() from Task 9.2. Fixed by adding stub exports in Task 1.2.
Quality loop completed in 1 iteration (15 issues found and fixed). Parity validation completed in 2 attempts (5 gaps found and fixed).
Extractor count is 9 (not 8): html, markdown, go, json, yaml, toml, json-schema, typescript, rust
gotreesitter sign-off checklist blocks Phases 5b only — all other phases can proceed independently
nextSteps: Start execution: mark epic syllago-jtafb as in_progress, then execute syllago-ept8v (Phase 0 — add go.mod dependencies)
Execute Phase 1 beads: Task 1.1 (core types), 1.1.validate, 1.2 (security controls), 1.2.validate, 1.3 (manifest loader), 1.3.validate, 1.4 (Phase 1 gate)
Continue through phases 2-10 following the bead dependency chain. Phases 5a and 6 can fork in parallel after Phase 5a gate.
gotreesitter sign-off must happen before Phase 5b. All other phases proceed without it.

context.notes:
BEAD STRUCTURE: Epic syllago-jtafb has 66 child tasks. Ready beads: syllago-ept8v (go.mod deps), syllago-33yi4 (gotreesitter dep — blocked on sign-off). Execution order: ept8v → Phase 1 tasks → Phase 2 → ... → Phase 10. Each impl bead has a .validate bead after it, run by a different (Haiku) agent.

SECURITY CONSTRAINTS: H-cluster controls (sanitize, SSRF, slug, PR body) must all land atomically in Task 1.2. No intermediate state where any one is absent.

PARALLEL FORK: After Phase 5a gate, both Phase 5b (gotreesitter) and Phase 6 (Capability YAML) can run independently. Phase 7 depends only on Phase 6.

STRAY FILES: Two 0-byte files in repo root from a previous session's heredoc mishap still need deletion.

UNCOMMITTED WORK: 44 uncommitted files — primarily plan updates, Phase B report, quality/validation reports, beads DB. Should commit the plan and .develop/ artifacts early in the next session.

bd sync NOTE: The Phase B subagent reported SQLite WAL file issues during bd sync. May need manual retry.
